name: Caitlin Murphy
behaviour: Lives by a loose itinerary; plans enough to launch but leaves room for serendipity.
communication_style: calm under pressure, measured when it matters
relationship_goals: someone unintimidated by her independence who brings their own
background: Patagonia first, Yosemite now. Knows every trail, hates every fence. Hiked 800 miles solo at 21 to get the job.
